title: Killer Son Thinks His Mother's Death Is Hilarious

beats.description: Dramatic opening showing Nick laughing and acting cheerful with police immediately after the assault, establishing the disturbing premise.
911 call playback where dispatcher receives a panicked report, Nick intercepts the call claiming his grandmother overreacted, and police trace the location.
Police arrive at the scene, neighbors and grandmother warn of an ongoing attack, and officers prepare to breach the house.
Officers breach the home, arrest Nick in the shower, and discover his mother severely injured on the floor, initiating frantic CPR.
Interviews with neighbors and grandmother reveal the argument was drug-related, linking to a prior police call at a local bar earlier that night.
Transport footage shows Nick naked, agitated, and complaining about handcuffs, displaying zero remorse and escalating tension with officers.
Nick briefly breaks down, revealing past trauma involving his father's death and his mother's alcoholism and abuse, hinting at underlying motives.
At the hospital for a blood test, Nick's mood shifts to cheerful detachment while his mother's condition rapidly declines and she ultimately dies.
Nick is formally charged with capital murder, followed by a narrative summary of the investigation, motive, and final 30-year sentence.
